title: springy herbal norwegian kiwifruit tart
description: a refreshing springtime dessert featuring kiwifruit, herbal notes, and a norwegian twist

ingredients.name: almond flour
ingredients.notes: make sure to sift before using

ingredients.name: finely chopped fresh dill
ingredients.notes: add in the last 10 minutes of sous vide time

ingredients.name: dried lavender buds
ingredients.notes: be cautious, as lavender can be overpowering

instructions: preheat your sous vide machine to 150°f (65°c),
roll out the almond flour to 1/8" thickness and place in a tart pan,
in a separate bowl, whisk together the kiwifruit, unsalted butter, caster sugar, and kosher salt,
in a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and dried lavender buds,
pour the egg mixture over the kiwifruit mixture and stir until combined,
pour the mixture into the almond flour crust and smooth the top,
place the tart under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, or until the top is lightly golden,
remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes,
transfer the tart to a serving plate and drizzle with honey, if desired
drizzle with additional honey, if desired, and garnish with chopped dill
garnish with additional fresh dill, if desired
serve at room temperature or chilled, depending on preference
